name: dev-loop
description: Standalone local coordination hub for the dev-loop agents — a zero-build, zero-native-dep MCP system-of-record over node:sqlite with per-agent identity, a localhost web-UI daemon, an opt-in agent op-API + thin stdio shim, and a CLI-portable transport (Claude Code / Codex / opencode). See https://github.com/dyzsasd/dev-loop (docs/HUB-ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/PORTABILITY.md).

scripts.test: node test/smoke.ts && node test/loop.ts && node test/isolation.ts && node test/docs.ts && node test/board.ts && node test/channel.ts && node test/mirror.ts && node test/identity.ts && node test/resolve-project.ts && node test/daemon.ts && DEVLOOP_CHANNEL_DRYRUN=1 DEVLOOP_CHANNEL_TOKEN=xoxb-DRYRUNSECRET DEVLOOP_MIRROR_DRYRUN=1 node test/agent-api.ts && DEVLOOP_CHANNEL_DRYRUN=1 DEVLOOP_CHANNEL_TOKEN=xoxb-DRYRUNSECRET DEVLOOP_MIRROR_DRYRUN=1 node test/shim.ts && node test/lifecycle.ts && node test/lifecycle-race.ts && node test/blocked.ts && node test/no-progress.ts && node test/migrate.ts && node test/release.ts && node test/mcp-config.ts && node test/init-service.ts && node test/mcp-merge.ts && node test/wal-checkpoint.ts && node test/version-sync.ts && node test/build-artifact.ts && node test/accept-rate.ts && node test/cycle-stage.ts && node test/seed.ts && node test/cli-tickets.ts && node test/open-wip.ts
